name: Sant'Emiliano Classico
descShort: Smooth and buttery with notes of fresh-cut grass, sweet almond, and a gentle peppery finish. Our everyday essential.
descLong: Our signature blend, crafted from a careful selection of Moraiolo, Frantoio, and Leccino olives harvested at peak ripeness from our family grove in the Trevi valley. Smooth and buttery on the palate, with delicate notes of fresh-cut grass, sweet almond, and a pleasingly gentle peppery finish. Versatile enough for everything from salad dressings to a simple drizzle over bread — this is the oil we reach for every single day.

highlights.label: Aroma
highlights.title: Fresh Grass & Almond
highlights.text: Clean, inviting scent of freshly cut grass with a warm undertone of sweet almond.

highlights.label: Palate
highlights.title: Buttery & Smooth
highlights.text: A soft, round texture with a clean buttery quality that coats the palate gently.

highlights.label: Finish
highlights.title: Gentle Pepper
highlights.text: A subtle, pleasing warmth at the back of the throat — the hallmark of a quality extra virgin.
